title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on community safety in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Promotes advancements in polymer technology and manufacturing within the Charlotte region.

title: Suspect Arrested in Richmond County Shooting
summary: A victim was hospitalized after being shot in the chest and leg in Richmond County; a suspect is now in custody.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing crime issues and law enforcement responses in Richmond County.

title: NTSB Releases Report on Deadly Mooresville Tanker Explosion
summary: The NTSB released a preliminary report on the Mooresville tanker explosion that killed a truck driver and injured another.
charlotte_impact: Addresses safety concerns and regulatory oversight in the transportation industry.

title: Burn Ban Lifted in Mecklenburg County Amid Drought Recovery
summary: The North Carolina Forest Service lifted the burn ban for Mecklenburg and 18 other counties due to recent rainfall.
charlotte_impact: Indicates improved environmental conditions but warns of continued drought risks.

title: Luke Combs Receives Honorary Degree from App State
summary: Country music star Luke Combs received an honorary degree from App State after raising funds for western NC.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the positive impact of celebrities on local communities and education.

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal
summary: The CMS board will review an updated $2.1 billion budget proposal after rejecting the superintendent's initial plan.
charlotte_impact: Concerns the financial planning and resource allocation for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools.

title: Cooler and Drier Weather Forecast for Friday
summary: The weather forecast predicts cooler and drier conditions for Friday, with potential scattered showers over the weekend.
charlotte_impact: Provides routine weather updates relevant to daily activities and planning.

title: Neese’s Sausage Disappears from North Carolina Shelves
summary: Neese’s sausage products have vanished from shelves, leaving customers and restaurants searching for the iconic brand.
charlotte_impact: Impacts local businesses and consumers due to supply chain or production issues.

title: Former Daycare Worker Indicted for Murder in Toddler's Death
summary: A former daycare worker was indicted for murder in the death of a toddler, accused of suffocating the child.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious concerns about childcare safety and accountability.

title: Gastonia Police Shooting Deemed Justified
summary: A deadly police shooting in Gastonia during an alcohol sales enforcement operation in January was ruled justified by the DA.
charlotte_impact: Addresses issues of police conduct and accountability in law enforcement.

title: Man Accused of Burning Cross to Intimidate Black Neighbors
summary: A South Carolina man is facing a detention hearing for allegedly burning a cross to intimidate his Black neighbors.
charlotte_impact: Highlights racial tensions and hate crimes in neighboring communities.

title: Teen Suspects Charged with Murder in Chesterfield County Death
summary: Three teen suspects now face murder charges in the death of Landon Sellers in Chesterfield County.
charlotte_impact: Concerns youth violence and the escalation of charges in criminal cases.

title: Decarlos Brown Found Incompetent to Stand Trial
summary: Decarlos Brown, charged with the stabbing death of Iryna Zarutska, was found incompetent to stand trial.
charlotte_impact: Addresses mental health issues within the criminal justice system.

title: Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles to Step Down in June
summary: Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles will resign in June, leading to a process that may result in an unelected mayor until 2027.
charlotte_impact: Impacts local governance and political leadership in Charlotte.
